visual_description:
In a dimly lit, cluttered room, the camera focuses on a group of young men. The central figure, a man with pale, platinum-blonde hair and a serious, intense expression, stares forward. To his left, another young man with a mustache looks on with a concerned and slightly fearful face. In the background, other figures are visible but out of focus. The lighting is low, casting deep shadows and highlighting the characters' faces. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The camera is in a close-up, creating a tense and intimate atmosphere. A male voice speaks in a low, taunting, and aggressive tone, filled with condescending anger, as he says, "Don't be a coward!" Another male voice immediately follows, shouting with a commanding and impatient urgency, "Do it!"

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a young man with dark hair and glasses, standing alone in the same dark, cluttered space. He wears a brown jacket over a dark shirt. He looks forward with a calm but determined expression. The background is filled with dark, indistinct shelves and objects, creating a mysterious and somber mood. The same watermark is present in the
